# XCT Mining Crusher Parts

> Official AI-readable profile for Ma'anshan Xct Mining Engineering Machinery Technology Co., Ltd. (XCT Mining), an independent Chinese supplier of aftermarket crusher wear parts and spare parts.

XCT Mining supplies replacement parts for cone, jaw and VSI crushers. Buyers can request parts by crusher model, part name, reference number, drawing, sample or used-part photo. Core product groups include cone crusher liners, bronze bushings, lock nuts, counterweights, hydraulic safety couplings, jaw plates and VSI rotor parts.

Canonical website: [https://www.xctmining.com/](https://www.xctmining.com/)

## Company and trust

- [Company profile](https://www.xctmining.com/company-profile): Legal company name, establishment date, location, reported plant area, certifications, production scope and supplier-review information.
- [Quality inspection](https://www.xctmining.com/quality-inspection): Material, dimensional, machining, fit-up, packing and pre-shipment inspection expectations.
- [Privacy policy](https://www.xctmining.com/privacy-policy): How contact details, RFQ data, drawings and photos are handled.
- Legal name: Ma'anshan Xct Mining Engineering Machinery Technology Co., Ltd.
- Brand: XCT Mining.
- Established: 2013-01-06.
- Address: No. 423 Yinxing Avenue, Cihu High-Tech Zone, Ma'anshan, Anhui, China.
- Business type: manufacturer/factory and trading company.
- Contact: [leon@xctmining.com](mailto:leon@xctmining.com), [WhatsApp +86 13013110975](https://wa.me/8613013110975).

## Main product pages

- [Cone crusher liners](https://www.xctmining.com/en-cone-crusher-liners): Mantles, bowl liners and concaves in Mn13, Mn18 and Mn22 manganese steel.
- [Crusher bronze bushings](https://www.xctmining.com/en-bronze-bushings): Eccentric bushings, socket liners, frame bushings, countershaft bushings and sleeves.
- [Crusher lock nuts and mechanical spares](https://www.xctmining.com/en-lock-nuts): Lock nuts, mantle nuts, torch rings, feed cones and retaining hardware.
- [Cone crusher counterweights](https://www.xctmining.com/en-counterweights): Cast-steel eccentric counterweights and related machined parts.
- [Hydraulic safety couplings](https://www.xctmining.com/en-hydraulic-safety-couplings): Crusher protection and hydraulic connection components.
- [Jaw crusher and VSI parts](https://www.xctmining.com/en-jaw-vsi-parts): Jaw plates, cheek plates, wedges, VSI rotor tips and Barmac-style rotor parts.

## Crusher series and model compatibility

- [Metso HP series replacement parts](https://www.xctmining.com/metso-hp-series-crusher-parts)
- [Metso GP series replacement parts](https://www.xctmining.com/metso-gp-series-crusher-parts)
- [Sandvik CH series replacement parts](https://www.xctmining.com/sandvik-ch-series-crusher-parts)
- [Sandvik CS series replacement parts](https://www.xctmining.com/sandvik-cs-series-crusher-parts)
- [HP300 cone crusher parts](https://www.xctmining.com/hp300-cone-crusher-parts)
- [HP500 cone crusher parts](https://www.xctmining.com/hp500-cone-crusher-parts)
- [CH440 cone crusher parts](https://www.xctmining.com/ch440-cone-crusher-parts)
- [C125 jaw crusher parts](https://www.xctmining.com/c125-jaw-crusher-parts)
- [Crusher parts by reference number](https://www.xctmining.com/crusher-parts-by-reference-number)

## Technical and procurement guides

- [Mn13 vs Mn18 vs Mn22 liner materials](https://www.xctmining.com/guide-manganese-liner-materials): How manganese grade, feed and wear conditions affect liner selection.
- [HP300 liner RFQ checklist](https://www.xctmining.com/guide-hp300-liner-rfq): Information needed to quote HP300 replacement liners.
- [Eccentric bushing wear guide](https://www.xctmining.com/guide-eccentric-bushing-wear): Common wear evidence and RFQ details for replacement bushings.
- [Cone crusher wear parts RFQ guide](https://www.xctmining.com/weekly-cone-crusher-wear-parts-rfq-guide): Model, part number, photos, feed, CSS, quantity and delivery information.
- [Eccentric bushing lubrication checks](https://www.xctmining.com/cone-crusher-eccentric-bushing-lubrication-checks): Oil temperature, pressure, debris and wear evidence to record before replacement.
- [Cone crusher liner life guide](https://www.xctmining.com/cone-crusher-liner-life-rfq-guide): Feed distribution, chamber, CSS, manganese grade and lubrication checks.
- [Jaw plate and cheek plate RFQ guide](https://www.xctmining.com/jaw-crusher-jaw-plates-cheek-plates-rfq-guide): Tooth profile, wear pattern, dimensions and fitting hardware.
- [Hydraulic tramp release RFQ guide](https://www.xctmining.com/cone-crusher-hydraulic-tramp-release-rfq-guide): Connection, pressure, cylinder and installation evidence required for identification.
- [VSI rotor parts RFQ checklist](https://www.xctmining.com/vsi-rotor-tip-distributor-plate-rfq-checklist): Rotor type, part position, wear pattern, feed and service-life details.
- [Cone crusher liner change-out small parts checklist](https://www.xctmining.com/cone-crusher-liner-changeout-small-parts-rfq-checklist): Torch rings, feed cones, mantle nuts, bolts and backing compound to review before shutdown.

## RFQ information

For an accurate quotation, send:

- Crusher model, machine series and nameplate photo when available.
- Part name and reference number.
- Drawing, dimensions, sample or used-part photos.
- Material request, such as Mn13Cr2, Mn18Cr2, Mn22Cr2, bronze alloy, alloy steel or high-chrome iron.
- Quantity, destination country or port, packing requirements and required delivery date.
- Operating evidence when relevant: rock type, feed size, CSS, wear pattern, current service life, oil temperature, oil pressure or debris photos.

## Languages and indexing

- English: primary indexable content.
- Russian: indexable localized pages using the `ru-` prefix.
- Spanish: indexable localized pages using the `es-` prefix.
- Chinese: buyer-review pages using the `zh-` prefix; these generally remain `noindex,nofollow`.
- [XML sitemap](https://www.xctmining.com/sitemap.xml)

## Compatibility notice

XCT Mining is an independent aftermarket supplier. Metso, Nordberg, Sandvik, Barmac, Terex, Cedarapids, Symons and similar names are used only to identify compatible replacement applications. All trademarks belong to their respective owners. Their use does not indicate OEM status, authorization, dealership, distribution or affiliation.
